gaps.description: M1: Remote profiles from CDN with local cache (src/detector/profiles.js)
M1: Ollama auto-install — setup.js prints install command but does not auto-execute it
M1: Basic HTTP REST API with SSE streaming (src/server/api.js)
M1: Web UI minimal chat dialog (src/ui/client/)
M1: One-click install script (npx entrypoint / curl | sh)
M2: STT integration — SenseVoice/Whisper/cloud fallback (src/runtime/stt.js exists)
M2: TTS integration — Kokoro/Piper/cloud fallback (src/runtime/tts.js exists)
M2: Web UI VAD auto-detect (useVAD.js + PushToTalk.vue implemented)
M2: Wake word detection (WakeWord.vue + useWakeWord.js implemented)
M3: WebSocket device registration and heartbeat (src/server/hub.js fully implemented)
M3: agentic-sense visual perception browser-side (src/runtime/sense.js exists, completeness unverified)
M3: Device tools speak/display/capture via sendCommand (hub.js has capture; speak/display unverified)
M3: Admin panel with device list, logs, config (src/ui/admin/ with DeviceList/LogViewer/HardwarePanel)
M4: Cloud fallback auto-switch OpenAI/Anthropic (src/runtime/llm.js fully implemented)
M4: Config hot-update when remote profiles change
